title: OpenAI for Startups
description: OpenAI for Startups provides technical resources, community programming, and potential API benefits to startups building and scaling products with OpenAI.
eligibility: Startup resources are broadly available, while free API credits and additional benefits generally require a referral from a participating venture-capital partner and OpenAI approval.
value: Resources and, for eligible partner-backed startups, API credits, rate-limit upgrades, technical support, and events
